law_note: Indicator ≠ permission. Percentage ≠ certification. Go/No-Go ≠ deployment. Notification ≠ execution. AMK/human opens lanes; gates verify before work.
percent_bands_doc: 0–25 concept/doctrine · 26–50 docs/metadata · 51–75 validator/report/dashboard visible · 76–90 tested local baseline · 91–99 release-candidate review · 100 human-signed release/deploy-ready receipt

cloudflare_go_no_go.summary: Cloudflare or edge deploy remains closed until a separate human-approved deployment lane exists. This card is advisory metadata only.
required_gates: npm run verify:md and dashboard:registry-verify when UI/docs move
Z-Traffic + CAR² posture acceptable for scope
Commercial Z-SUSBV / overseer signals not RED for paid surfaces
manual_release / release control posture per AGENTS.md
blocked_categories: Live production bind without overseer approval
Silent API token placement in repo
Auto-promote shadow HTML to production without merge ritual
